projects.name: QUIUC - Quantum Computing
projects.description: The first and only undergraduate quantum computing organization. My aim was to make a highly technical field--mostly restricted to academics--accessible to any student through workshops and team-based projects.

projects.name: Association of Data Science and Analytics
projects.description: The premier data science student organization at the University of Illinois. We design workshops and support projects that empower students to drive decisions through data.

projects.name: Overheard App
projects.description: Leading the backend development for a new social media app based on minimal data collection and location based content sharing. The backend is all in on AWS Serverless utilizing Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, and ElastiCache.

projects.name: Serverless REST Boilerplate
projects.description: An opinionated starter repository I designed for developing Serverless REST API's on AWS. Built around Node.js, the Serverless Framework, AWS Lambda, and DynamoDB to offer a quick basis with best practices pre-loaded.

projects.name: State Farm Hack Day Winner
projects.description: Led a small team as the full stack developer of a computer vision project to simplify and streamline the claims filing process for customers through the State Farm App. Out of 1000+ full time developers we were chosen as the executive's choice winner.

projects.name: Markov Chain Tweet Generator
projects.description: A custom tweet generator that scrapes one or more Twitter user's tweets and any additional text to form a custom Tweet for that user. This was a quick team project to serve as a demo for ADSA at Engineering Open House 2019.

projects.name: N-Slit Diffraction Simulation
projects.description: A web application developed for the University of Illinois Department of Physics to aid in teaching introductory quantum physics courses.
